title: Wandering Wizards 2
description: A RPG/adventure modpack which main focus is ZsoltMolnarr's Rpg Series.
body:
Resource Pack Links: 
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/recolourful-containers-gui-hud-dark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/recolourful-containers-gui-hud-dark)

Vanilla Tweaks-
[https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

A RPG/Adventure modpack in which includes an abundant amount of medievel/fantasy mod series Including:
-RPG Series
  Wizards
  Rogues and warriors
  Paladins and priests
  Archers
  Jewelry
-Yungs Better Structures
  All of Yungs better structures mods excluding better desert temples and better ocean monuments

Sigular Mods:
-Choice Theorems Overhauled Village
-Dungeons and Taverns
-Better End
-Deeper Darker
-Supplementaries
-Amendments
-Antique Atlas 4
-Waystones

World Gen Mods:
-Terralith
-Tectonic
-Regions Unexplored
-Terresstria
-William Wyther's Overhauled Overworld
-Wilder Wild
